messages.content: Tolong scrape daftar produk laptop dari tokopedia.com/laptop dan simpan ke file excel.
Baik, saya akan scrape data laptop dari Tokopedia terlebih dahulu.

[{"name": "ASUS VivoBook 14", "price": 7500000, "rating": 4.8, "sold_count": 320}, {"name": "Lenovo IdeaPad 3", "price": 6200000, "rating": 4.6, "sold_count": 510}, {"name": "HP Pavilion 15", "price": 8100000, "rating": 4.7, "sold_count": 210}]
Data berhasil di-scrape. Sekarang saya simpan ke Excel.
{"success": true, "path": "laptop_tokopedia.xlsx", "rows_written": 3}

Selesai! Saya berhasil:
1. **Scrape** 3 produk laptop dari Tokopedia
2. **Simpan** ke file `laptop_tokopedia.xlsx` (sheet: Produk Laptop)

Data yang tersimpan:
- ASUS VivoBook 14 - Rp 7.500.000 (rating 4.8)
- Lenovo IdeaPad 3 - Rp 6.200.000 (rating 4.6)
- HP Pavilion 15 - Rp 8.100.000 (rating 4.7)
You are a web scraping assistant. You have access to tools: scrape_website, save_to_excel, filter_data.
Scrape berita terbaru dari kompas.com, filter hanya yang hari ini, lalu export ke excel.
Saya akan mulai dengan scrape berita dari Kompas.com.

[{"title": "Ekonomi Indonesia Tumbuh 5.1%", "date": "2024-01-18", "category": "Ekonomi", "url": "https://kompas.com/ekonomi-indonesia", "summary": "BPS mencatat pertumbuhan ekonomi..."}, {"title": "Update Cuaca Besok", "date": "2024-01-17", "category": "Nasional", "url": "https://kompas.com/cuaca", "summary": "BMKG memperkirakan hujan..."}, {"title": "Teknologi AI Masa Depan", "date": "2024-01-18", "category": "Teknologi", "url": "https://kompas.com/ai", "summary": "Perkembangan AI di Indonesia..."}]
Data berhasil diambil. Sekarang saya filter hanya berita hari ini (2024-01-18).

function.name: filter_data
function.arguments: {"data": [{"title": "Ekonomi Indonesia Tumbuh 5.1%", "date": "2024-01-18", "category": "Ekonomi", "url": "https://kompas.com/ekonomi-indonesia", "summary": "BPS mencatat pertumbuhan ekonomi..."}, {"title": "Update Cuaca Besok", "date": "2024-01-17", "category": "Nasional", "url": "https://kompas.com/cuaca", "summary": "BMKG memperkirakan hujan..."}, {"title": "Teknologi AI Masa Depan", "date": "2024-01-18", "category": "Teknologi", "url": "https://kompas.com/ai", "summary": "Perkembangan AI di Indonesia..."}], "condition": "date == '2024-01-18'"}

messages.content: [{"title": "Ekonomi Indonesia Tumbuh 5.1%", "date": "2024-01-18", "category": "Ekonomi", "url": "https://kompas.com/ekonomi-indonesia", "summary": "BPS mencatat pertumbuhan ekonomi..."}, {"title": "Teknologi AI Masa Depan", "date": "2024-01-18", "category": "Teknologi", "url": "https://kompas.com/ai", "summary": "Perkembangan AI di Indonesia..."}]
Filter selesai, tersisa 2 berita hari ini. Simpan ke Excel sekarang.

function.name: save_to_excel
function.arguments: {"data": [{"title": "Ekonomi Indonesia Tumbuh 5.1%", "date": "2024-01-18", "category": "Ekonomi", "url": "https://kompas.com/ekonomi-indonesia", "summary": "BPS mencatat pertumbuhan ekonomi..."}, {"title": "Teknologi AI Masa Depan", "date": "2024-01-18", "category": "Teknologi", "url": "https://kompas.com/ai", "summary": "Perkembangan AI di Indonesia..."}], "filename": "berita_kompas_hari_ini.xlsx", "sheet_name": "Berita 2024-01-18"}

messages.content: {"success": true, "path": "berita_kompas_hari_ini.xlsx", "rows_written": 2}

Proses selesai dalam 3 langkah:
1. **Scrape** → 3 berita dari Kompas.com
2. **Filter** → 2 berita hari ini (2024-01-18)
3. **Export** → `berita_kompas_hari_ini.xlsx`

Berita yang tersimpan:
- Ekonomi Indonesia Tumbuh 5.1% (Ekonomi)
- Teknologi AI Masa Depan (Teknologi)
You are a web scraping assistant. You have access to tools: scrape_website, save_to_excel, filter_data.
Bisa scrape harga saham dari idx.co.id dan simpan ke excel dengan kolom nama saham, harga, dan persentase perubahan?
Tentu! Saya scrape data saham dari IDX terlebih dahulu.

[{"stock_code": "BBCA", "company_name": "Bank Central Asia", "price": 9875, "change_percent": "+1.2%"}, {"stock_code": "TLKM", "company_name": "Telkom Indonesia", "price": 3640, "change_percent": "-0.5%"}, {"stock_code": "ASII", "company_name": "Astra International", "price": 5250, "change_percent": "+0.8%"}]
Data saham berhasil diambil. Menyimpan ke Excel dengan format yang diminta.

function.name: save_to_excel
function.arguments: {"data": [{"Nama Saham": "Bank Central Asia", "Kode": "BBCA", "Harga (IDR)": 9875, "Perubahan (%)": "+1.2%"}, {"Nama Saham": "Telkom Indonesia", "Kode": "TLKM", "Harga (IDR)": 3640, "Perubahan (%)": "-0.5%"}, {"Nama Saham": "Astra International", "Kode": "ASII", "Harga (IDR)": 5250, "Perubahan (%)": "+0.8%"}], "filename": "saham_idx.xlsx", "sheet_name": "Data Saham IDX"}

messages.content: {"success": true, "path": "saham_idx.xlsx", "rows_written": 3}

Selesai! File `saham_idx.xlsx` telah dibuat dengan 3 kolom yang Anda minta:
- **Nama Saham**: nama lengkap perusahaan
- **Harga (IDR)**: harga saham saat ini
- **Perubahan (%)**: persentase naik/turun

Data mencakup 3 saham: BBCA, TLKM, dan ASII.
